titleStmt.title: SII 8.245: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 245. (A.R. No. 640 of 1902). ON THE INNER GOPURA OF THE SAME TEMPLE, LEFT-OF ENTRANCE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koṟcaṭaipaṉmar tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ
śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu pattāvatu
mārkaḻimātattu nāḷ Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu tiru
mikaiccūr Uṭaiyār tirumikaiccūruṭaiyanāyaṉār tiru
kkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya civakāmacuntari nācciyār
kku Uṭaiyār kāliṅkarāyarrum kaṭaikkūṭṭupiḷ
ḷai Ātittatevarum sabhaiyārum nāṭṭārum cāttuppaṭi parivaṭ
ṭam paṭi viñcaṉattukkum mutalaṭaṅka IṟaiyiliĀka viṭṭa
tirunāmattukkāṇi viraiyāviṭaṅkanallūrilum poṉmenta
perumāḷnallūrilum 10Āvatu kāttikaimātavarai nāṭṭil
vakuppil kūṭṭikkiṭanta Āyamutalum mārkaḻimātamutal Eṟṟi
kkoḷḷum ceṭṭikaḷ palapaṭṭaṭaiyum taṟiiṟai taṭ
ṭārpāṭṭam ceṉaikkaṭai veṭṭaikkāṟarkkaṭaiyu
m kuḷavaṭai Oḻukkunīr miṉpāṭṭam cekkāyam vaṇṇārkaṟkā
cu palakaṇimālaikaḷum Uppuvaḻiccārikai Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉai
ttu Āyavaṟkaṅkaḷum kuṭieṟṟikkoṇṭu Inta Āyavaṟkaṅkaḷāluḷ
ḷa mutalkaḷum Inta nācciyārkku cāttuppaṭi tirupparivaṭṭam pa
ṭiviñcaṉattukkum viṭṭatu Ippaṭikku cempilum kallilum ve
ṭṭikkoḷka Ippaṭikku cantirāĀtittavaraiyum Iṟaiyili Āka
koḷka . Ippaṭikku Ivai kulacekarakāliṅkarāyar Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku
Ivai Ātittatevar Eḻuttu Ivai mātevapaṭṭar Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku
Ivai putucceriuṭaiyār Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai coḻiyataraiyar
Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭar Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi
kku Ivai māmpākkiḻār Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai tuṟaiyūruṭaiyār Eḻuttu .
Ippaṭikku Ivai Utaiyativākarapaṭṭar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 8.245 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
